name: provider-issue-workbench
description: Pulumi provider issue triage, RPC lifecycle analysis, repro staging, bridge parity, and workaround investigation.

interface.shortDescription: Triage Pulumi provider issues and lifecycle failures.
interface.longDescription: Evidence-driven Pulumi provider issue workflows for attribution, RPC lifecycle analysis, durable repros, bridge parity investigations, and practical workarounds.
defaultPrompt: Trace this Pulumi RPC lifecycle issue.
Check whether this is a bridge parity gap.
